channel.title: Peter Educate's Sports Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Peter Educate's Sports Blog

item.title: Jayhawks survive Chet Holmgren to win NCAA Championship
item.description: This is my cool blog post about the Jayhawks. library(tidyverse) ## ── Attaching packages ─────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse 1.3.1 ── ## ✓ ggplot2 3.3.5 ✓ purrr 0.3.4 ## ✓ tibble 3.1.6 ✓ dplyr 1.0.8 ## ✓ tidyr 1.2.0 ✓ stringr 1.4.0 ## ✓ readr 2.1.2 ✓ forcats 0.5.1 ## Warning: package 'tidyr' was built under R version 4.1.2 ## Warning: package 'readr' was built under R version 4.1.2 ## Warning: package 'dplyr' was built under R version 4.

m— author: Peter Educate date: “2022-03-24” title: About Welcome to my page! My name is Peter Educate and I am a Junior at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln. I was born in Dallas, TX but was raised in Kansas City for most of my life. I am majoring in Sociology with a minor in Statistics. Since my arrival, I have grown as a person and a student. I hope to graduate in May of 2023 with hopefully an occupation in research waiting for me.
